expositionText: My brother has been missing for days now. I fear the worst. The last anyone saw, they were heading {location_hint}.
acceptText: Thank you. Speak with {target_npc} in the settlement {location_hint}. They were the last to see him alive.
declineText: I... I understand. Not everyone can help. I'll keep searching alone.
skillcheckPassText: You notice signs of a struggle near the settlement. This won't be a simple search.
skillcheckFailText: You look around but nothing stands out. Still, you can help.
expositionTurnInText: You spoke with them? What did they say?
conflict1Text: So he went toward the caves. I've heard rumors of {enemy_type_plural} lurking out there. Clear out {gather_count} of them so I can search the area safely.
conflict1TurnInText: Those creatures... they were guarding something. I knew it.
conflict2Text: There's one more thing. Collect {gather_count} {quest_item}. I need to prepare supplies before I go looking for him myself.
conflict2TurnInText: This is everything I need. Now I can go find him.
resolutionText: I can finally go after him properly. You've done more than I could have asked. Thank you, truly.
